name: aggregator: within a single namespace folder, files are processed in alphabetical order (deterministic per architecture)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && for n in c b a; do printf 'source:
  id: g-%s
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' "$n" > "tree/google/$n.yaml"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-load-order --format json 2>out.json && node -e 'const r=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));const order=r.load_order.filter(p=>p.startsWith("google/"));if(JSON.stringify(order)===JSON.stringify(["google/a.yaml","google/b.yaml","google/c.yaml"])){process.stderr.write("ok
")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: "+JSON.stringify(order)+"
");process.exit(1)}'
